title: pelargonium × gymnophyllum
intro: Pelargonium × gymnophyllum is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as a type of geranium. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Pelargonium × gymnophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
